title: Friends
description: A mod that adds quality of life additions for playing with friends
body:
This mod adds the ability to add a friend using the **/friendsmod** command or by using a customizable keybind.
Friends, by default, have a green **[Friend]** nametag, and you can't damage them (this can be changed in the mod settings or by using a customizable keybind).

It's especially helpful when you don't remember everyone on your team and want to see exactly who's with you.

Note: this mod won't work on servers with custom nametags
![Nametag showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jjybaWHU/images/ffa8e3e802fff144ab68a84b355d550f3efea057.png)
